name: JSC HALYK BANK GDR (EACH REPR 4
summary: JSC Halyk Bank is a financial services group offering a range of banking, insurance, leasing, brokerage, and asset management services to retail, SME, and corporate customers, primarily in Kazakhstan, and also internationally. The bank operates through various segments, including retail banking, corporate banking, SME banking, and other financial services. Halyk Bank's headquarters are located in Almaty, Kazakhstan.
